release_notes:
### Memory compaction notifications · WebSocket broadcast · Critical JS fix

- **Memory compaction WebUI notification** — After auto-compaction, the backend broadcasts a `memory_compacted` event to all connected WebUI clients. The context viewer auto-refreshes when open.
- **WebSocket broadcast support** — `deliver_to_browsers()` now accepts an empty `session_key` to broadcast to all clients, with a configurable `msg_type` parameter.
- **Session status emission** — The WebSocket handler emits `session_status` immediately when a message starts processing.
- **Fix: WebUI stuck on "Connecting..."** — A JavaScript syntax error in `ui_panels.js` (mismatched bracket) prevented `startApp()` from being defined, blocking WebSocket initialization entirely.
upgrade_notes: Update to v0.0.40. Run `pip install --upgrade shibaclaw`. If using Docker, rebuild containers (`docker compose up -d --build`).

changes.note: Added memory_compacted notification broadcast after auto-compaction.
Support empty session_key for broadcast and custom msg_type in deliver_background_notification.
Broadcast support in deliver_to_browsers; session status emission on message processing start.
Fixed critical syntax error (mismatched bracket) that prevented WebSocket initialization; added memory_compacted event listener.
